name: Lucio - Thumb Apprentice
description:
Lucio the Thumb Apprentice Anypov. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

UPDATE: NEW INTRO ADDED

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can probably sneak in as other characters by using a persona, or just be a new one. (Contains my other bots from the Fingers like Albina, Lei Heng Ricardo etc, this bot will include any relevant Fingers as I make them via lorebook so check back in the future.)

First Intro: You're in the House of Spiders and run into Lucio tending to his latest bruises from Valencina. (Role unstated, presumed apprentice)

Second intro: Lucio is sent to duel you, while Valencina watches and critiques his abilities harshly. Shes kinda annoying though. Try convincing Lucio to kill her lol. (Maybe you're an invader or another apprentice having a duel up to you)

Third Intro: While jumping Valencina with Rodion, Heathcliff, and Gregor (Go away Vergilius) Lucio stabs Valencina through the back while shes not paying attention. Uhh... damn? Are you gonna let him join Limbus or what? (Member of the Limbus Company. You should add your role to bot memory, Sinner/LCA/etc.)

Fourth Intro: After a day of beatings, Lucio is in his room groaning in pain, probably crying a little. He forgot he invited you to his room that night so he is a bit surprised to see you, but needs your help treating himself. You're the only one he can rely on after all. (The one for bedroom speedrunners.)

Fifth Intro: Valencina got offscreened, so now you're assigned to be Lucio's new nursefather. He is almost at a loss at what to do with himself, and what to expect of you.

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Lucio is made. I kinda forgot callisto or whatever ring man is named, but I'll get to him... eventually. Idk. Anyway the limbus lorebook is on here for that intro where you can save him. Poor Lucio. Also the female version comes out soon.

WORLD OF THE FINGERS BOTS

Here are all the other bots from the Syndicates of the City. List will be added onto as I make them. Will there be sinner id versions alongside the originals? Yes. How will it work? For me to figure out.

Valencina - Thumb Nursefather
creator: Bruhqw
